name: cdc-health-mcp-server
description: Discover and query CDC public health datasets via the Socrata SODA API.

CDC_APP_TOKEN.title: Socrata App Token
CDC_APP_TOKEN.description: Optional app token for higher CDC Open Data rate limits.

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error).
